title: AN ACT CREATING CERTAIN BARRIOS IN THE PROVINCE OF CAMARINES SUR

chunks.text:
H. No. 2778 / 55 OG No. 40, 8443 (October 5, 1959)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2592, June 21, 1959 ]

AN ACT CREATING CERTAIN BARRIOS IN THE PROVINCE OF CAMARINES SUR

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The sitios of Catanusan, Irayang Solong, Mataoroc, Manapao and Salingongon in the Municipality of Minalabac, Province of Camarines Sur, are converted into barrios of said municipality to be known as the barrios of Catanusan, Irayang Solong, Mataoroc, Manapao and Salingongon, respectively.
